Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class LoginFlow

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.LoginFlow
public class LoginFlow extends Object

Java class for LoginFlow complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LoginFlow">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="flow" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="flowType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LoginFlowType"/>
         <element name="friendlyName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="uiLoginFlowType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}UiLoginFlowType"/>
         <element name="useLightningRuntime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="vfFlowPage" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="vfFlowPageTitle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
